items.title: Personal Training
items.description: One-on-one coaching built around your goals, current fitness level, and schedule.

items.title: Strength & Resistance Training
items.description: Progressive programming to build muscle, improve movement quality, and get stronger safely.

items.title: Endurance & Conditioning
items.description: Cardiovascular and conditioning work designed to improve stamina at a sustainable pace.

items.title: Nutrition Guidance
items.description: Straightforward, practical nutrition support that fits your goals and everyday routine.

items.title: Customized Workout Programs
items.description: A training plan built specifically for you, adjusted as your goals and progress change.

items.title: Online Coaching
items.description: Remote coaching with programming and check-ins, for clients training outside the gym.
